prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-COLLAPSWATER-CARRIER-20L-IR-TT Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Collapsible Water Carrier Camping Emergency Bag - 5 Gallon/20 Liter Description: The ASR Outdoor emergency water carrier is designed to fold down flat for easy storage and transportation when not in use. The convenient collapsible design makes it an ideal water carry bag for camping, hiking and backpacking. Just fold it down and store it in your backpack, hiking gear or camping supplies.

Our water bag comes with a top carry handle for easy lifting and pouring out in the field. The bag features a valve and red spigot to assist with pouring water. Each bag holds up to 5 gallons of liquid (20 liters) and measures 9" x 12" x 13" when expanded.

The water carrier is made from high-quality BPA free plastic materials that are safe for holding liquids for consumption. The semi-transparent material will allow you to see the amount of water contained inside and when to refill it. Make sure to take this water carrier on your next camping, hiking or backpacking trip. Search Terms: water bottle carrier with strap for walking camping water container camping water filter camping kettle emergency water storage pouches camping accessories gear essentials cookware must haves utensils hiking gear backpack backpacking gear food Features: - COLLAPSIBLE DESIGN - ASR Outdoor emergency water carrier folds down flat for easy storage and transportation when not in use. Store it in your backpack, hiking gear or camping supplies to ensure access to clean water in an outdoor emergency situation - CONVENIENT CARRY HANDLE - Water bag comes with top carry handle for easy lifting and pouring out in the field. Bag features a valve and red spigot to assist with pouring water while camping, hiking, backpacking and more - LARGE CAPACITY - Each bag holds up to 5 gallons of water (20 liters); Dimension of the expanded carrier bag when filled with water is 9" x 12" x 13"; Collect, store and hold fresh water while camping, hiking and backpacking - DURABLE LIGHTWEIGH CONSTRUCTION - Water carrier bag made from high-quality, BPA free plastic material that is safe for holding water for consumption. Semi-transparent material allows you to see the amount of water contained inside - SPECIFICATIONS - Capacity: 5 gallons (20 liters); Expanded dimensions: 9" x 12" x 13"; Color: semi-transparent, green, red, black; Top carry handle; Material: BPA free plastic (safe for storing liquids for consumption) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-Gallon Collapsible Water Carrier Bag

anthropic.title_differentiation: 20 Liter Capacity, Folds Flat, BPA-Free, Carry Handle, Valve Spigot, Camping Hiking Backpacking

openai.title_differentiation: Folds Flat For Storage, BPA Free Plastic, Valve And Red Spigot, Carry Handle, Emergency Water Supply
